title: Text input component with validation and accessibility features
purpose: Provides a reusable text input field with support for controlled/uncontrolled values, validation, accessibility attributes, and error messaging.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named TextInput that accepts various props for customization and handles internal state management for uncontrolled inputs.

steps.content: Generate unique IDs for the input and associated labels/descriptions.
Initialize internal state for tracking the input value and validation errors.
Determine the current value, using either the controlled prop or internal state.
Define the change handler to update internal state, notify parent, and validate input.
Define the blur handler to perform validation when the input loses focus.
Render the input element with appropriate attributes and styling based on validation state.
Display error message below the input if validation fails.
Extract the new value from the change event.
Update the internal state with the new value.
Notify the parent component of the value change.
IF validation function is provided, run it against the new value and update error state.
IF validation function is provided, run it against the current input value.
Update the error state with any validation result.
